anyone successfully weaned antidepressants Hey Reddit genuinely curious anyones experience coming antidepressants TLDR experience like coming anti depressants worth think staying long term would best Im currently fairly low dose Paxil CR 25mg worked wonders anxiety dont bad side effects considering weaning worry possible long term effects taking close 8 years prior different antidepressants another 4 years Several years ago got great therapist even changes therapists due changing jobs pregnancy Ive lucked similarly great therapists past years anxiety minimum Im cured obviously Ive become better handling noticed major improvements still see therapist month havent felt need increase frequency Im considering asking doctor weaning medication since seem stable point life tried previously made mistake right big stressful move Ended becoming total anxious wreak weeks put back Paxil extra note diagnosed doctor inattentive ADHD last year low dose Vyvanse well 30mg take take Paxil night safe feel also led improvement mood could possibly make coming Paxil little easier maybe nothing haha storiesadvice welcome Thanks advance Update 1 wanted say thank stories Im surprised many people replied quickly really helpful seeing everyones different experiences worked best clarify help doctor Planning start move next year dont big life events happening Also wanted clarify antimedication confidently say medication saved life see boost needed therapyself care practices helping anxiety feel point dont need would rather possible turns need keep taking good quality life
